calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-18-2025 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Feb-04-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-17-2024 Continued To Feb-04-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
John A. Mangini for Ronel V. Velasco, Executor (via Zoom).

Counsel reported that the petition to close the estate is expected to be filed by the first week of January 2025. The court continued the matter to February 4, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-05-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Nov-09-2022 is admitted to probate. Ronel V. Velasco is appointed as Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Dec-17-2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Park. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-17-2023 Continued To Dec-05-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
